meta.title: I Became CEO of a $40M AI Video Startup for 24 Hours
meta.description:
I Became the CEO of AIVIDEO, a popular AI Film Making tool that has ai video generators build in. In the next 24 hours I set out to achieve 3 main goals: 1. Create a consistent ai character builder. 2. Create a succesful AI marketing campaign and 3. Get a $100M investment. 

👀 The Consistent AI Character builder is actually live! 
Check it out 👉 https://www.aivideo.com/?promocode=DAN20
As the former CEO I managed to create a 20% discount code: DAN20

All jokes aside - it was great meeting the team of aivideo.com and getting to see what it is like to work for an AI Startup. Thank you Eduardo & Justin for inviting me to San Francisco. 

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
